title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for prediction markets on real-world events. The company spent four years fighting regulatory barriers before achieving regulatory approval and scaling to a $22 billion valuation within weeks. The founders framed prediction markets as transparent price discovery mechanisms rather than gambling.
